matrix_structure.interpretation: Draw probability equals diagonal score mass. The diagonal/even-total ratio isolates conditional score-allocation concentration from the amount of even-total probability available.

governance.next_step: Only after diagnosis, test any draw-structure challenger with competition-specific strict chronological OOF. Do not hand-adjust draw probabilities.
